com.hp.workpath.api.deviceusage.printer

Class PrinterInfo.CopyByMediaSize

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.hp.workpath.api.deviceusage.printer.PrinterInfo.CopyByMediaSize
  • Enclosing class:
    PrinterInfo

    public class PrinterInfo.CopyByMediaSize
extends java.lang.Object
    Copy impressions of Job information by mediaSize
    Since:
    API 7

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor and Description
      CopyByMediaSize() 

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      int getColorImpressions()
      Retrieves Color Impressions
      java.lang.String getMediaSize()
      Retrieves MediaSize string of job

      Retrieves MediaSize Type of job

      Retrieves Mono Impressions

      Retrieves Total Impressions Count

    • Constructor Detail

      • CopyByMediaSize

        public CopyByMediaSize()

    • Method Detail

      • getMediaSize

        public java.lang.String getMediaSize()
        Retrieves MediaSize string of job
        Returns:

        Media Size

        • Returns the Media size string for the printer e.g: ANSI_A_8point5x11in, Legal_8point5x14in, Executive_7point25x10point5in etc.

        Since:
        API 7

      • getMediaSizeType

        public SubUnitInfo.MediaSize getMediaSizeType()
        Retrieves MediaSize Type of job
        Returns:

        media size type of the job

        • Return value will be the media size of SubUnitInfo e.g: LETTER, LETTER_ROTATE, LEDGER etc.
        • Return value will be of the type SubUnitInfo.MediaSize.

        Since:
        API 7

      • getColorImpressions

        public int getColorImpressions()
        Retrieves Color Impressions
        Returns:

        Color Impressions

        • Return value will be greater than or equal to zero

        Since:
        API 7

      • getMonoImpressions

        public int getMonoImpressions()
        Retrieves Mono Impressions
        Returns:

        Mono Impressions Count

        • Return value will be greater than or equal to zero

        Since:
        API 7

      • getTotalImpressions

        public int getTotalImpressions()
        Retrieves Total Impressions Count
        Returns:

        Total Impressions Count

        • Return value will be greater than or equal to zero

        Since:
        API 7
